finding_results.notes: Reworked the records-room sequence so Mara participates only via text/audio and never appears physically on-site.
Threat pivot now names Thomas Pike as vulnerable target, specifies Service Corridor B attack mechanics, and states immediate institutional/consequence failure if prevention misses.
Hospital reconciliation now retains an unresolved operational boundary: Beau requires pre-move notification and threatens withdrawal if Lena freelances another entry.
Converted cited narration emphasis fragments into complete subject-verb sentences while preserving pressure and rhythm.
Added independent corroboration steps after Ida's anecdote (Deputy Waller call-pattern logs and gala route/security packet) before Lena writes the Thomas target inference.

summary: Chapter 12 was revised for structural/craft blockers: Mara continuity was aligned via remote-only participation, hospital fallout now carries an explicit unresolved trust boundary, causal support for the Thomas-target prediction was strengthened with independent records, the threat pivot was made concrete and embodied, and clipped narration fragments were repaired in the cited lines.
